character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who navigates the ship and oversees the passage to the island.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A narrator and cabin party member who reports Silver's conversation.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member who smokes and expresses concern about fever.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member who acknowledges his men and expresses distrust.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member who strategizes and addresses mutiny.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member suspected of mutiny and described as a remarkable man.

character_dossiers.name: Hands
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member trusted by the squire but suspected of mutiny.

character_dossiers.name: Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: A boat commander who grumbles about the island's effects on discipline.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member armed with a pistol for mutiny prevention.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member armed with a pistol for mutiny prevention.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: A cabin party member armed with a pistol for mutiny prevention.
